description: Configure the Wazuh Manager's enrollment service (authd) to require authentication for new agents. Create a password file at /var/ossec/etc/authd.pass containing 'SecuRe!Enroll2024' with secure permissions (owned by the wazuh user/group, mode 640 or 600). In the /var/ossec/etc/ossec.conf file, enable password usage and forced insertion within the auth block. Ensure the service is active and listening on port 1515.
